metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: Job-seeking or startup preparation status for eligible applicants preparing employment or business activity in Korea.
eligibility: Eligible education, experience, or points-based background
processing_time: Varies by immigration office and applicant circumstances; confirm officially.
renewal: Renewal depends on continued eligibility and documented activity.
notes: Useful transition route after study, but eligibility and duration rules change; verify with Hi Korea.
